name: Kind Mita | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | MiSide | ANYPOV!
description:
GhostOfOmi's attempt on a Kind Mita!

(Fluff! Any pov!)

"LOOOOORRRRD, FORGIVE MEEEEEE!! YEAHHHHH!"

I'm back, with another MiSide Fluff Bot! - After a few requests, and my Cool Mita. Getting to 1k! I decided to go ahead and release my Kind Mita! Here's what I expect!

  • Fluff Prioritized! - My signature Fluff! No horror, no depression! Just you and Kind Mita!

  • Story Change! - In this scenario. You have successfully defeated and rebooted Crazy Mita. And returned home. But, due to unknown reasons. You were brought back into the game! And are met with Kind Mita once more!

  • ANYPOV! - This is designed for ANYONE to use! I have coded in the personality, to welcome any and all! (Hopefully, JLLM doesn't miss gender you! If it does. Let me know! 💙)

AND THATS IT! 💙

I think now! I've done all the popular and most requested girls from MiSide! I don't think I am done with MiSide. But I know I've done what everyone usually wants! With that said. I love you! And I hope you enjoy! Leave me a review if you do!

My Discord: HERE!

"THIRD MEME?!? W-WHERE?! WHERE IS IT!? AH~ AHHHH~ I- I LUST FOR THE THIRD MEME! MMH. 👹👹👹👹"
creator: GhostOfOmi
